summary: Iteration 157: ActionCard UX Improvements Testing. All requested features verified: (1) ActionCard content area is clickable via Link wrapper navigating to /appointments/{id}, (2) Trash icon correctly appears only for organizer cards ('Créé par vous'), (3) No trash icon on participant cards ('Invitation de...'), (4) Accept/Decline buttons preserved on participant invited cards, (5) Remind (Relancer) button preserved on organizer cards, (6) Delete modal opens correctly when trash icon clicked, (7) DELETE /api/appointments/{id} endpoint works correctly.

passed_tests.test_01_dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with 'Actions requises' section visible (4 actions)
passed_tests.test_02_action_card_clickable: PASS - ActionCard content area wrapped in <Link to='/appointments/{id}'> - clicking navigates to detail page
passed_tests.test_03_trash_icon_organizer: PASS - Organizer cards ('Créé par vous') have trash icon with data-testid='delete-action-{id}'
passed_tests.test_04_no_trash_participant: PASS - Participant cards ('Invitation de...') do NOT have trash icon
passed_tests.test_05_accept_decline_buttons: PASS - Participant invited cards have Accept/Decline buttons (3 Accept, 3 Decline found)
passed_tests.test_06_remind_button: PASS - Organizer cards have 'Relancer' button with data-testid='remind-action-{id}'
passed_tests.test_07_delete_modal: PASS - Clicking trash icon opens delete confirmation modal with 'Supprimer cet engagement' title
passed_tests.test_08_delete_endpoint: PASS - DELETE /api/appointments/{id} returns 404 for non-existent ID (endpoint exists and works)
passed_tests.test_09_card_navigation: PASS - Card click navigates to /appointments/{appointment_id} detail page
passed_tests.test_10_participant_account: PASS - Participant account (igaal@hotmail.com) shows correct role labels and buttons

frontend_tests.organizer_dashboard: PASS - testuser_audit@nlyt.app sees 4 action cards, 1 organizer card with trash, 3 participant cards with Accept/Decline
frontend_tests.participant_dashboard: PASS - igaal@hotmail.com sees mixed cards (some as organizer, some as participant) with correct buttons
frontend_tests.card_click_navigation: PASS - Clicking card content navigates to appointment detail page
frontend_tests.delete_modal: PASS - Trash icon click opens modal with Annuler/Supprimer buttons

critical_code_review_comments: ActionCard component (lines 112-241): Correctly refactored with Link wrapper for clickable content
Trash icon (lines 216-226): Correctly shows only when !isParticipant with data-testid='delete-action-{id}'
Quitter button (lines 227-238): Correctly shows for participants who accepted (not invited, not pending guarantee)
Accept/Decline buttons (lines 179-197): Preserved for participant invited cards
Remind/Cancel buttons (lines 199-214): Preserved for organizer action cards
Link wrapper (line 126): Content area wrapped in <Link to={detailLink}> for navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: ActionCard UX improvements verified. Key data-testid attributes: action-card-{id}, delete-action-{id}, accept-btn-{id}, decline-btn-{id}, remind-action-{id}, quit-action-{id}, role-label-{id}. The Quitter button only appears for participants who have already accepted (not invited, not pending guarantee) and appointment hasn't started.

features_verified.card_clickable: Content area (title, date, location) wrapped in Link to /appointments/{id}
features_verified.trash_icon_organizer: Trash2 icon shown for organizer cards (!isParticipant)
features_verified.no_trash_participant: No trash icon on participant cards
features_verified.buttons_preserved: Accept, Decline, Remind, Cancel, Finalize buttons all working
